revision.comment: Text replacement - "== AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA ==" to "== AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA == [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]]"
revision.text:
{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = E Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | image = File:E-jinja 01.jpg | location = 992 Myojin-oku, E, Futami-cho, [[Ise]], {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|qid=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture|1=Mie Prefecture}}, Japan | Latitude = 34 | Latitude_Min = 30 | Latitude_Sec = 10.3 | Longitude = 136 | Longitude_Min = 47 | Longitude_Sec = 21.2 | Map = Japan Mie | Deities = Nagakuchi-no-Mikoto
Ōtoshi-no-Mikoto
[[Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto]] | type = {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|lt=Shikinaisha}} (minor shrine)
{{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} auxiliary shrine | Established = Traditional date: 25th year of Emperor Suinin's reign | Main Hall = [[Shinmei-zukuri]] | Other Name = Makie no Myojin | Pilgrimage Sites = | festival = | Rituals = [[Kannamesai]] | Label Position = left | location = {{ill|Ise|qid=Q328067|1=Ise, Mie}} | coordinates = {{Coord|34.502861|N|136.789222|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | architecture_style = {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|qid=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} }} '''E Shrine''' (江神社, *E Jinja*) is an [[auxiliary shrine]] (*sessha*) of [[Ise Grand Shrine]] ({{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, *Naikū*), Ranking 17th among the 27 auxiliary shrines of Naikū.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): pp. 9–11 It is located at the eastern foot of Mount Otonashi and enshrines guardian deities of abundant harvests.Gakken Publishing (2013): p. 70 == Overview == {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|qid=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture|1=Mie Prefecture}}{{ill|Ise, Mie|en|Ise, Mie|qid=Q328067|lt=Ise City|1=Ise, Mie}}, Futami-cho E, Aza Myojin Oku 992Tatsumi Publishing (2013): p.81. The shrine was established by {{ill|Yamatohime-no-mikoto|en|Yamatohime-no-mikoto|qid=Q4388732|lt=Yamatohime-no-mikoto|1=Yamatohime-no-mikoto}}Ise Culture Publishing (2008): p.98. The name of the shrine originates from an {{ill|Inlet|en|Inlet|qid=Q1172599|lt=inlet|1=Inlet}}. Locally, it is called "Maki-e no Myojin" (Maki-e Shrine) due to the scenery of pine trees growing around the inlet. This name appears in historical texts like "Kanbun Sessha Saikoki" and "Jingu Shrine Pilgrimage Records," indicating its recognition during the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|qid=Q184963|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period}}Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): p.308. However, there is no conclusive evidence confirming that Egami Shrine and "Maki-e no Myojin" are the sameShikinaisha Research Association (1990): pp.308-309. The shrine grounds cover an area of 1,140 m²Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): p.307. In ancient times, it spanned approximately 9,917 m² with a shrine building measuring 1.2 m in length, 1.5 m in width, and 1.8 m in heightShikinaisha Research Association (1990): p.308. == Deities Enshrined == The enshrined deities are Nagakuchime-no-Mikoto, Ootoshi-no-Mioya-no-Mikoto, and {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|宇加乃御玉命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. All three are local deities associated with agricultural fertility. Nagakuchime-no-Mikoto, also known as "Eno Hime," is considered identical to {{ill|Benzaiten|en|Benzaiten|qid=Q818468|qid=Q818468|lt=Benzaiten|1=Benzaiten}}. According to the "Kotaijingu Gishikicho," she is the child of {{ill|Ame-no-Subaru-no-Mikoto|ja|天須婆留女命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Subaru-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (the deity of {{ill|Sugihara Shrine|ja|棒原神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugihara Shrine|qq=}})Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): p.306. == History == Legend states that {{ill|Yamatohime-no-mikoto|en|Yamatohime-no-mikoto|qid=Q4388732|lt=Yamatohime-no-mikoto|1=Yamatohime-no-mikoto}} arrived by boat from {{ill|Mishioden Shrine|ja|御塩浜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mishioden Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, met {{ill|Samitsuhiko-no-Mikoto|ja|佐美津日子命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Samitsuhiko-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and established Egami Shrine. While many shrines related to the Ise Grand Shrine enshrine deities who welcomed Yamato-hime, Samitsuhiko-no-Mikoto is not among Egami Shrine’s deitiesShikinaisha Research Association (1990): p.306. The shrine was revived on October 11, 1663 (Gregorian: November 10, 1663)Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): p.307. The current site is debated, with some scholars suggesting it was originally at {{ill|Taie-ji Temple|ja|太江寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taie-ji Temple|1=Taikō-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11444039}}Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): pp.308-309. The shrine was reconstructed in December 1913Ujiyamada City Office (1929): p.10 and renovated on September 21, 1977Shikinaisha Research Association (1990): p.308. == Rituals == Major festivals include the {{ill|Tsukinamisai|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinamisai|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=}}, {{ill|Kannamesai Festival|en|Kannamesai Festival|qid=Q11255045|lt=Kannamesai|1=Kannamesai Festival}}, {{ill|Kinen-sai|en|Kinen-sai|qid=Q118906710|lt=Kinen-sai|1=Kinensai}}, and {{ill|Niiname-no-Matsuri|en|Niiname-no-Matsuri|qid=Q11501518|lt=Niinamesai|1=Niiname-no-Matsuri}}, where priests from the Ise Grand Shrine conduct ceremoniesShikinaisha Research Association (1990): p.307. == Flora == A 1979 survey reported that while the {{ill|Typhoon Vera|en|Typhoon Vera|qid=Q1060156|lt=Ise Bay Typhoon|1=Typhoon Vera}} caused extensive damage, some {{ill|Camphora officinarum|en|Camphora officinarum|qid=Q158722|lt=camphor trees|1=Camphora officinarum}} and {{ill|Pinus thunbergii|en|Pinus thunbergii|qid=Q854884|lt=black pines|1=Pinus thunbergii}} survivedShikinaisha Research Association (1990): pp.307-308. Replanted {{ill|Cryptomeria|en|Cryptomeria|qid=Q147388|lt=cedar|1=Cryptomeria}}, {{ill|Chamaecyparis obtusa|en|Chamaecyparis obtusa|qid=Q917187|lt=cypress|1=Chamaecyparis obtusa}}, and {{ill|Viburnum odoratissimum|en|Viburnum odoratissimum|qid=Q12600081|lt=coral bush|1=Viburnum odoratissimum}} now populate the groveShikinaisha Research Association (1990): p.308. == Access == Located near {{ill|Ise Meotoiwa Interactive Aquarium Sea Paradise|ja|伊勢夫婦岩ふれあい水族館シーパラダイス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise Meotoiwa Interactive Aquarium Sea Paradise|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ゼロ距離水族館伊勢シーパラダイス|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ゼロ距離水族館伊勢シーパラダイス|1=Zero Distance Aquarium Ise Sea Paradise|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11371781}}: * {{ill|Sangū Line|en|Sangū Line|qid=Q872023|lt=JR Sangū Line|1=Sangū Line}}: 23-minute walk from Matsushita Station (approx. 1.8 km) * {{ill|Mie Kotsu|en|Mie Kotsu|qid=Q6843516|lt=Mie Kotsu Bus|1=Mie Kotsu}}: 5-minute walk from the "E" bus stop (approx. 540 m) * {{ill|Ise Futami Toba Toll Road|ja|伊勢二見鳥羽有料道路|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise Futami Toba Toll Road|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 伊勢二見鳥羽ライン|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 伊勢二見鳥羽ライン|1=Ise Futami Toba Line|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11378935}}: 6-minute drive from {{ill|Futami JCT|ja|二見ジャンクション|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futami JCT|1=Futami junction|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10880410}} (approx. 3.1 km) == References == {{Reflist|2|qq=}} == Bibliography == * [[伊勢文化舎]] 編『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、伊勢文化舎、平成20th year 12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4th year 1月20日、862p. * [[:en:学研パブリッシング|学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013rd year 7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 *{{cite book | author =式内社研究会 | editor = | title =式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1 | url = | format = | year =1990 | publisher =[[Kogakkan University]] | location = | id = ISBN 4-87644-080-8 |ref=harv|qq=}} * 『日本人なら知っておきたい 伊勢神宮と125の社』タツミムック、[[辰巳出版]]、2013rd year 11月1日、127p. ISBN 978-4-7778-1197-7 == See Also == * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧|lt=List of 125 Shrines of Ise|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|3=伊勢国の式内社一覧|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of 125 Shrines of Ise|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|qq=}} * [[二見町 (三重県)]] - [[東二見村]] == External Links == {{ external media | align = | width = 230px | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image1 = [http://www.sengukan.jp/wp-content/themes/sengukan/images/shrine/area10/area10_02.jpg 江神社] }} * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m10/1003.html 江神社（えじんじゃ）] - 一般財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 {{神道 横|qq=}} {{125 Shrines of Ise|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|江神社|version=61946183|comment=Imported full ja history}} == AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA == [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]] '''E Shrine (Q18336610)''' is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ise Province]]. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! District !! Name !! Funding category !! Rank !! Notes !! Same as !! Co-ords !! Shrine DB |- | {{ill|Watarai District|en|Watarai District|ja|度会郡|ceb|Watarai-gun|ckb|گەڕەکی واتاری|es|Distrito de Watarai|fr|District de Watarai|id|Distrik Watarai, Mie|it|Distretto di Watarai|ko|와타라이군|pl|Powiat Watarai|uk|Повіт Ватарай|zh|度會郡|lt=Watarai district|qid=Q1131032|1=Watarai District}} || {{ill|E Shrine|lt=E Shrine|ja|江神社|qid=Q18336610|1=E Shrine}} || {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|lt=Kokuhei|comment=categorized|1=Kokuhei-sha}} || {{ill|Shikinai Shōsha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} || part of {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|qid=Q11581011|1=Kōtai Jingū}} || — || {{coord|34.502888|136.789233|display=inline}} || [https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181139 DB] |} {{wikidata link|Q18336610}}==Notes== [[da:d:Q18336610]] [[ja:江神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Futami Town]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]] [[Category:Moto-Ise shrines]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise City]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Pages with 50+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Pages with 100+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Pages with 150+ untranslated japanese characters]]
